title: The Preservation of Antiquity
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line. There is an example at the beginning (0).

questions.explanation: Requires a noun describing the act of removing something.
Requires a noun with a negative/error prefix to indicate things are out of place.
Requires a noun with a negative prefix to denote vanishing.
Requires a plural agent noun (people who work in conservation).
Transformation into an adjective with a negative prefix (cannot be denied).
Requires a noun involving an internal vowel and consonant change.
Requires a participial adjective with a negative prefix meaning 'matchless'.
Requires a verb meaning to make wider/larger; internal change + suffix.
